chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.371 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on office objection as at “A” For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 17.02.2026 Mr. Zaheer Ahmed Ujjan, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant/accused, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction for disposal of this case expeditiously. Learned A.P.G. has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, with direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant expeditiously, preferably within two months. J U D G E Gusher/PS
